question.text: The syllabus weightage for Chapter 15 (Technical Analysis) in the NISM XV exam is:

answer.text: 15 marks — the highest weightage among all chapters

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Technical Analysis carries 15 marks — the highest individual chapter weightage. This reflects its importance in the research analyst curriculum. **The Trap:** TA has the highest weightage (15%), even more than Valuation Principles (12%) or Legal/Regulatory (10%). **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM XV syllabus outline. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Allocate study time proportional to weightage: TA (15%), Financial Analysis (12%), Valuation (12%), Legal (10%).
